title: ilex cornuta f. burfordii
intro: Ilex cornuta f. burfordii, also known as the Chinese Holly, is a flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The Ilex cornuta f. burfordii is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
